title: batch: RefPlus result reference chaining
description:
Implement JMAP RefPlus result reference chaining (urn:ietf:params:jmap:refplus):
- Detect refplus capability in session
- Allow ResultReference values inside /set create/update bodies and /query filter conditions
- Primary use case: Message/set create → Message/query in one round-trip (send-and-scroll)
- Define ResultReference type; serialize as {#resultOf, name, path} in request JSON
- Test: fixture showing Message/set create with result ref in subsequent Message/query

Fixture file: tests/fixtures/batch_refplus.json
close_reason: Implemented JmapRequestBuilder, call_batch, ResultReference, Session::supports_refplus/quotas, Quota type, quota_get(); all tests pass
